name: fpf-memory
description: Bun-first compiler-backed FPF spec runtime exposed through hosted and local Mastra MCP surfaces with a Hono server engine.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/cli.ts ./src/server.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun run build:mcp
scripts.build:mcp: tsup src/mastra/stdio.ts --format esm --out-dir dist --no-splitting && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path='dist/stdio.js';const data=fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8');const shebang='#!/usr/bin/env node';if(!data.startsWith(shebang))fs.writeFileSync(path, shebang + '\\n' + data);" && chmod +x dist/stdio.js
scripts.deploy: bun run predeploy && npx mastra build && npx mastra server deploy
scripts.lint: rslint --type-check src tests scripts/generate-docs.ts scripts/download-upstream-spec.ts scripts/generate-architecture-diagrams.ts *.config.ts
scripts.docs:build: bun run docs:generate && RSPRESS_PERSISTENT_CACHE=false rspress build
